title: astragalus zanskarensis
intro: Astragalus zanskarensis, also known as Zanskar milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. It is a member of the pea family and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to have various health benefits, including improving immune function, reducing stress, and protecting against cardiovascular disease. Astragalus zanskarensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried roots, capsules, and teas, which are often used to promote overall well-being and improve resilience to illness.
